events.description: 3rd Annual Cultural Event celebrating the richness of Asian cultures through tradition, performance, and community engagement.

events.title: Jubilee
events.description: Hosted by ASA's interns, join us next Wednesday for an event filled with fun, friends, and heated debate.

events.title: Sweetheart Social
events.description: Join TSO and ASA in making real flower bouqets! Snacks, drinks & mini games will be provided!
